power.method: Wired doorbell transformer (12-24V DC / 16-24V AC, 10W) with a built-in 600mAh Li-ion backup battery

storage.notes: No microSD slot; records to an Ajax NVR or Ajax Cloud Storage.

features: smart IR illumination with auto intensity
full-duplex two-way audio with noise suppression + echo cancellation
Jeweller & Wings radio integration with the Ajax ecosystem
release_notes: Single-camera Ajax DoorBell (ADB.Y.W), 4MP with a 155-degree wide view. Wired to a doorbell transformer (600mAh battery is backup only). Wi-Fi 2.4GHz + Jeweller/Wings only — no Ethernet/PoE. Distinct from the Ajax DoorBell DualCam, which adds a second downward-facing camera for a parcel/floor view.

frigate.notes: Ajax DoorBell is ONVIF Profile S conformant (Profile S mandates RTSP), but Ajax does not publish the RTSP path and the doorbell is primarily Wi-Fi/ecosystem-oriented — use ONVIF auto-discovery. Exact RTSP availability not independently confirmed for the doorbell.

blue_iris.notes: ONVIF supported; RTSP not independently confirmed for the doorbell.
